narrative:
Fremont City 1-C (precinct in Sandusky County) has 439 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.1 percentage points.
